description: Two-tier pain-point taxonomy for MarkOS literacy corpus. Parent tags drive Phase 40 discipline routing; sub-tags sharpen within-discipline filter precision.

parents.label: High Acquisition Cost
parents.definition: CAC / CPL / CPR trending above benchmark; budget efficiency degrading

parents.label: Low Conversions
parents.definition: Low CVR at key funnel moments - ad to landing page, landing page to lead, lead to trial

parents.label: Poor Retention / Churn
parents.definition: MRR churn, subscriber loss, repeat purchase rate declining

parents.label: Low Organic Visibility
parents.definition: Search rankings declining or stagnant; organic traffic share shrinking

parents.label: Attribution & Measurement
parents.definition: Cannot accurately attribute revenue to channel; data fragmentation across touchpoints

parents.label: Audience Mismatch
parents.definition: Reaching wrong ICP; poor segmentation; high bounce from irrelevant audiences

parents.label: Pipeline Velocity
parents.definition: Leads stalling in mid-funnel; follow-up gaps; nurture sequences not converting

parents.label: Content Engagement
parents.definition: Content published but not driving interaction, shares, comments, return visits

Paid_Media.label: High CPR
Paid_Media.definition: Cost-per-result above benchmark for ad format / objective

Paid_Media.label: Low ROAS
Paid_Media.definition: Return on ad spend below profitable threshold

Content_SEO.label: Low Rankings
Content_SEO.definition: Target keywords not ranking in top 20

Content_SEO.label: Thin Content
Content_SEO.definition: Pages lacking depth, E-E-A-T signals, or citable evidence

Content_SEO.label: Low Organic CTR
Content_SEO.definition: Ranking but not driving clicks - title/meta optimization gap

Lifecycle_Email.label: Low Open Rate
Lifecycle_Email.definition: Open rates below channel benchmark; deliverability / subject line issues

Lifecycle_Email.label: High Unsubscribe Rate
Lifecycle_Email.definition: List churn driven by frequency, irrelevance, or list hygiene

Lifecycle_Email.label: Weak Nurture Sequences
Lifecycle_Email.definition: Mid-funnel sequences not progressing leads to qualified stage

Social.label: Low Engagement
Social.definition: Content receiving near-zero interaction relative to reach

Social.label: Audience Growth Plateau
Social.definition: Follower growth stalled; organic reach declining

Social.label: Poor Brand Awareness
Social.definition: Low unaided recall; brand not associating with category problem

Landing_Pages.label: Low CVR
Landing_Pages.definition: Page visitor to form-fill below benchmark (< 2.5% for B2B)

Landing_Pages.label: High Bounce
Landing_Pages.definition: Visitors leave without scrolling or engaging - message/offer mismatch

Landing_Pages.label: Poor Form Completion
Landing_Pages.definition: Form started but abandoned; friction, length, or trust issue
